name: Zhang Lixiu

sections.short-biography: Impress neighbours by not complaining of bad treatment from aunt-in-law. Told Rice Rebels that family was hit by plague.

full_text:
Zhang Lixiu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Lixiuwas born in Hanzhong. Impress neighbours by not complaining of bad treatment from aunt-in-law. Told Rice Rebels that family was hit by plague. Zhang Lixiu was affiliated with Su Gu.
